mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST T1 WHERE 1=1 AND TO_CHAR(T1.SYS_RDATE,'YYYYMMDD') > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 5,'YYYYMMDD') AND ( T1.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3', '6', '8') OR ( T1.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('5', '7') AND CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL ) ) AND T1.PSTATE = '00' AND (T1.SCAN_ID IS NULL OR T1.SCAN_ID = '999999') AND T1.APP_FORM_XML_YN = 'N' ORDER BY T1.SYS_RDATE
